alkylation reagent: alkylated by incubation in 55 mM IAA at ambient temperature for 20 min in the dark
alkylation concentration: incubation in 55 mM IAA at ambient temperature for 20 min in the dark
cleavage agent: incubation in 40 μl trypsin (1.25 μg) at 37°C overnight
fractionation method: resolved for 10 min (100 V; 59 mA; 6 W) to 'stack' the whole sample into a single band
fragmentation method: sequencing by higher-energy C-trap dissociation (HCD) for peptide identification
instrument: using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
ionization type: ionized by electrospray ionization using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
labeling: labeled by tandem mass tag (TMT) 6plex isobaric labels
